reviews.comment:
Excelente parrilla libre. Muy buena comida, con gran variedad de opciones de carnes, achuras,fiambres, ensaladas .
Gaseosas y agua de litro
Todo está listo cuando llegas y no hay q esperar para comer. Una buena a opción si estás viajando xq no se pierde tiempo
Lugar impecable y bien climatizado .
Muy recomendable
Estacionamiento en amplio parque con arboleda.
Muy recomendable
Excelente atención

(Translated by Google)
Excellent all-you-can-eat grill. Very good food, with a wide variety of meats, offal, cold cuts, and salads. Soft drinks and liter bottles of water are available. Everything is ready when you arrive, so there's no waiting to eat. A great option if you're traveling because you don't waste any time. The place is spotless and well-air-conditioned. Highly recommended. Parking is available in a large, tree-lined park. Highly recommended. Excellent service.
